description_long: This sculpture depicts four stylized human figures arranged on a rectangular base. Three of the figures are seated closely together, their limbs intertwined, while the fourth figure reclines beside them, propping its head on one hand in a contemplative pose. The forms are simplified and abstract, with elongated limbs and minimal facial features, though the faces are highlighted with a golden hue. The surface of the sculpture is rough and stone-like, giving it a tactile, weathered appearance. The overall composition suggests a sense of unity and introspection among the figures. The sculpture is substantial in size and appears to be crafted from a solid, heavy material such as stone or concrete.
description: A rough-textured stone sculpture of four abstract human figures, three seated together and one reclining with a golden face. The forms are stylized and unified on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: The front view shows all four figures, with three seated closely and the reclining figure resting its head on one hand, their golden faces visible.
description_view_1: The left side view emphasizes the reclining figure's profile and the back of the seated group, with less detail visible on the faces.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the figures, highlighting the intertwined limbs and the textured surface of the sculpture.
description_view_3: The right side view focuses on the kneeling figure and the side of the reclining figure, with partial visibility of the golden faces.
attribute_subject_matter: abstract human figures in a contemplative arrangement
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
